name: Realtime Analytics API
summary: Low-latency ingestion + aggregation API for dashboards.
highlights: Designed ingestion pipeline and idempotent writes.
Reduced p95 latency from 220ms to 65ms via caching + query tuning.
Added structured logging and alert-ready error taxonomy.

caseStudy.problem: Dashboards needed near-real-time aggregates, but the existing pipeline was batch-oriented and slow under spikes.
caseStudy.approach: Built an ingestion API with idempotency keys, optimized aggregation queries, and added Redis caching for hot windows. Added structured logs and consistent error codes for alerting.
caseStudy.outcome: Lower latency, higher throughput, and better operational visibility with clear failure modes.

name: Payments Service
summary: Service layer for subscriptions, invoices, and webhooks.
highlights: Implemented webhook verification + retries with dead-letter queue.
Built audit trail for compliance reporting.
Improved reliability with circuit breakers and graceful degradation.

caseStudy.problem: Payment failures were hard to debug and retries caused duplicate side effects.
caseStudy.approach: Implemented signature verification, idempotent handlers, retry policies with a dead-letter queue, and an audit trail for traceability.
caseStudy.outcome: More reliable processing with fewer duplicates and faster incident resolution.
